data.name: Adamant Will
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains indestructible until end of turn. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy it.)
data.flavor_text: "I refuse to die before I see the sun rise again."

data.name: Boros Charm
data.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Boros Charm deals 4 damage to target player or planeswalker.
• Permanents you control gain indestructible until end of turn.
• Target creature gains double strike until end of turn.

data.name: Burrog Befuddler
data.oracle_text:
Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.)
When this creature enters, target creature an opponent controls gets -1/-0 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: Students who seek river herbs in Doradur quickly find themselves slightly damp and thoroughly surrounded.

data.name: Celestial Armor
data.oracle_text:
Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.)
When this Equipment enters, attach it to target creature you control. That creature gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.
Equipped creature gets +2/+0 and has flying.
Equip {3}{W} ({3}{W}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

data.name: Dive Down
data.oracle_text: Target creature you control gets +0/+3 and gains hexproof until end of turn. (It can't be the target of spells or abilities your opponents control.)
data.flavor_text: "Seeing the river is not the same as seeing the fish."

data.name: Divine Resilience
data.oracle_text:
Kicker {2}{W} (You may pay an additional {2}{W} as you cast this spell.)
Target creature you control gains indestructible until end of turn. If this spell was kicked, instead any number of target creatures you control gain indestructible until end of turn. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy them.)

data.name: Eaten by Piranhas
data.oracle_text:
Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.)
Enchant creature
Enchanted creature loses all abilities and is a black Skeleton creature with base power and toughness 1/1. (It loses all other colors, card types, and creature types.)

data.name: Fake Your Own Death
data.oracle_text: Until end of turn, target creature gets +2/+0 and gains "When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control and you create a Treasure token." (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

data.name: Fleeting Distraction
data.oracle_text:
Target creature gets -1/-0 until end of turn.
Draw a card.
data.flavor_text: The first spell taught to young mages, it has spared the lives of many whose hands are too small to hold a sword.

data.name: Fleeting Flight
data.oracle_text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains flying until end of turn. Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt to it this turn.
data.flavor_text: On that fateful day, Sir Brilbury's fear of heights was outmatched by his sense of duty.

data.name: Giant Growth
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +3/+3 until end of turn.

data.name: Goblin Surprise
data.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn.
• Create two 1/1 red Goblin creature tokens.

data.name: Ingenious Leonin
data.oracle_text: {3}{W}: Put a +1/+1 counter on another target attacking creature you control. If that creature is a Cat, it gains first strike until end of turn. (It deals combat damage before creatures without first strike.)
data.flavor_text: Leonin claws were already deadly weapons of natural evolution before he improved upon them.

data.name: Inspiring Call
data.oracle_text: Draw a card for each creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it. Those creatures gain indestructible until end of turn. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy them.)
data.flavor_text: "They said we were weak, did they? Let's show them what happens when we fight as one!"

data.name: Kindled Fury
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +1/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn. (It deals combat damage before creatures without first strike.)
data.flavor_text: "Fiends! Cowards! Your days of slaughtering innocents are done. It's time to face a real warrior!"

data.name: Make a Stand
data.oracle_text: Creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain indestructible until end of turn. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy them.)
data.flavor_text: For a moment they stood tall, all fear forgotten.

data.name: Moment of Triumph
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. You gain 2 life.
data.flavor_text: "The time of salvation is at hand. Dusk washes over the world, and the Legion will rise immortal!"

data.name: Offer Immortality
data.oracle_text: Target creature gains deathtouch and indestructible until end of turn. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy it.)
data.flavor_text: "Give all you are to Phyrexia, and you will receive more than you could have ever desired."

data.name: Snakeskin Veil
data.oracle_text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains hexproof until end of turn. (It can't be the target of spells or abilities your opponents control.)
data.flavor_text: Most travelers panic when they stumble upon the skin of a giant rattlewurm. Landry saw it as a gift.

data.name: Stab
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: Elgin's final mistake was assuming an intruder would come through the door, and not up the sheer, smooth, six-story wall.

data.name: Sure Strike
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +3/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn. (It deals combat damage before creatures without first strike.)

data.name: Twinblade Blessing
data.oracle_text:
Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.)
Enchant creature
Enchanted creature has double strike. (It deals both first-strike and regular combat damage.)

data.name: Undying Malice
data.oracle_text: Until end of turn, target creature gains "When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control with a +1/+1 counter on it."
data.flavor_text: Lazlo was going to find the jerks who stabbed him in the back and stab them in their fronts.

data.name: Valorous Stance
data.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Target creature gains indestructible until end of turn. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy it.)
• Destroy target creature with toughness 4 or greater.
data.flavor_text:
"Every choice alters the path of fate."
—Sarkhan Vol
